htext: Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab have higher mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
summary: Mean PFS = 4.64 mo on treatment_trastuzumab (n=10039) vs 4.71 off (n=39961); diff = -0.06, Welch t-test p = 0.0292.

htext: Patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen have higher mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
summary: Mean PFS = 4.72 mo on treatment_tamoxifen (n=15035) vs 4.68 off (n=34965); diff = +0.04, Welch t-test p = 0.0769.

htext: Patients receiving treatment_palbociclib have higher mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
summary: Mean PFS = 5.41 mo on treatment_palbociclib (n=17428) vs 4.31 off (n=32572); diff = +1.10, Welch t-test p = 0.

htext: Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have higher mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
summary: Mean PFS = 4.66 mo on treatment_olaparib (n=4946) vs 4.70 off (n=45054); diff = -0.04, Welch t-test p = 0.33.

htext: Patients receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan have higher mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
summary: Mean PFS = 4.69 mo on treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan (n=4987) vs 4.69 off (n=45013); diff = -0.01, Welch t-test p = 0.846.

htext: Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have higher mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
summary: Mean PFS = 4.63 mo on treatment_pembrolizumab (n=7585) vs 4.70 off (n=42415); diff = -0.07, Welch t-test p = 0.0175.

htext: ER-positive patients have different mean pfs_months than ER-negative patients.
PR-positive patients have different mean pfs_months than PR-negative patients.
HER2-positive patients have different mean pfs_months than HER2-negative patients.
HER2-low patients have different mean pfs_months than non-HER2-low patients.
BRCA1-mutated patients have different mean pfs_months than BRCA1-wildtype patients.
summary: Mean PFS = 4.67 mo brca1_mutation=1 (n=1277) vs 4.69 =0 (n=48723); diff = -0.02, p = 0.724.

htext: BRCA2-mutated patients have different mean pfs_months than BRCA2-wildtype patients.
PIK3CA-mutated patients have different mean pfs_months than PIK3CA-wildtype patients.
TP53-mutated patients have different mean pfs_months than TP53-wildtype patients.
MSI-high patients have different mean pfs_months than MSI-stable patients.
Stage-IV patients have lower mean pfs_months than non-stage-IV patients.
Patients with brain metastases have lower mean pfs_months than those without.
Patients with liver metastases have lower mean pfs_months than those without.
Patients with bone metastases have lower mean pfs_months than those without.
Node-positive patients have lower mean pfs_months than node-negative patients.
Patients with pleural effusion have lower mean pfs_months than those without.
summary: Mean PFS = 4.66 (pleural_effusion=1, n=7532) vs 4.70 (=0, n=42468); diff = -0.03, p = 0.278.

htext: Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps) is associated with lower mean pfs_months.
summary: OLS slope on ecog_ps = -1.180 mo per unit (p=0).

htext: The PFS benefit of treatment_trastuzumab is larger in HER2-positive patients than in HER2-negative patients (positive interaction effect).
summary: Interaction coefficient = -0.028 mo (p=0.695); positive => larger trastuzumab benefit when HER2+.

htext: The PFS benefit of treatment_tamoxifen is larger in ER-positive patients than in ER-negative patients (positive interaction effect).
The PFS benefit of treatment_palbociclib is larger in ER-positive patients than in ER-negative patients (positive interaction effect).
The PFS benefit of treatment_olaparib is larger in BRCA1- or BRCA2-mutated patients than in BRCA-wildtype patients (positive interaction effect).
code: ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib * brca_any') where brca_any = brca1_mutation OR brca2_mutation

htext: The PFS benefit of treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan is larger in HER2-low patients than in non-HER2-low patients (positive interaction effect).
The PFS benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab is larger in MSI-high patients than in microsatellite-stable patients (positive interaction effect).
Older age (age_years) is associated with shorter mean pfs_months.
summary: Slope = +0.1759 mo per year of age (p=0).

htext: Postmenopausal patients have different mean pfs_months than premenopausal patients.
summary: Mean PFS = 4.68 (postmeno, n=30238) vs 4.71 (premeno, n=19762); diff = -0.02, p = 0.311.

htext: The proportion of female patients (sex_female) differs from 100% in this breast cancer cohort (sanity check).

Mean pfs_months differs across insurance_type groups.

htext: After adjusting for age, ECOG, stage, sites of metastasis, labs, ER/HER2 status, and prior lines, treatment_trastuzumab is independently associated with longer pfs_months.

htext: The PFS benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab is larger in triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC: ER-/PR-/HER2-) than in non-TNBC patients (positive interaction).

code: ttest pfs_months by treatment_olaparib within brca_any==1
summary: In brca_any==1 (n=2499): PFS 4.93 on olaparib (n=239) vs 4.59 off (n=2260); diff = +0.35, p = 0.0414.

htext: A composite prognostic score (albumin_g_dl - ldh_u_l/200 - ecog_ps) is positively associated with pfs_months.
code: ols('pfs_months ~ prog_score') with prog_score = albumin - ldh/200 - ecog_ps
